reviews.review_description: I don't know were to begin! OK OK lets start with forza horizon 5, I DID NOT think it would work on my 3s headset but somehow it runs better that my PC (pc doesn't even load) graphics are AMAZING just as  good as good as my consoles graphics and it doesn't fill my storage to 99.999 lol. Only problem is u have to buy it if u cloud game. BUT U HAVE TO DO THAT ANYWAYS SO WHY DOES IT MATTER IF U HAVE TO BUY IT ON A CONSOLE. I love this app and being a middle schooler during the summertime this app takes away EVERY BIT of boredom. DO NOT LISTEN TO THESE BAD REVIEWS! GIVE IT A TRY BECAUSE I DID AND IT WAS AWESOME. 10/10

This needs to be fixed, or removed from the app store, now that I'm looking at other recent reviews a lot of others are also having this issue with it not installing. Why have this app if it won't install and it doesn't seem like anyone is working on fixing it. Disappointing.

Does it run Xbox games? Sure. Could I use a fork for soup? Absolutely. Is it going to suck the entire time? Probably. Don't expect any competitive multiplayer action. I have a hard time running BO7 zombies multiplayer without lag and I'm no more than 10 ft from my router with only my tv running on my wifi at 500mb speeds. Whenever I run it on my 2022 Moto Edge Plus it's flawless. Which leads me to believe that it's a ram issue.

reviews.review_title: it's not the best it's not the worst
reviews.review_description: after downloading the application i tried on loading up fortnite which yes is a highly competitive game but who knows anyways so when i started the game i immediately noticed the info lag within the game and the input lag was really really terrible it'll be delayed by like a whole a whole lot of frames and then when i tried to load hHogwarts legacy i noticed large graphic changes as if i was playing on switch notice that i was played on an oculus quest 2 which could be the reason of the graphic and the but i feel like it's a really harder way to play the games i really enjoy on my recommendation on any future updates is to prevent and limit which game a player can use within this application it could make the game look terrible when playing

reviews.review_title: Dont let the reviews deter you !
reviews.review_description: I was turned against trying this app due to all the negative reviews, that being said I just decided to download this last night not only was i able to play The Sims 4 it played beautifully!!! Download it, becuase honestly I found it 100 percent worth it.

.....so long as you have the right expectations going in. I have been able to play several xbox games using this app. The common thread to all the games I've tried so far is they were all designated as cloud based games and they worked great.
Paring your controller is hit and miss. The quest can see the controller however the app will not. Then I can't force close the app. It's a great idea however it sucks right now

This app can support many games and if your reading this deciding to get it or not. DO IT. 

Pros:
You can change your surroundings to be darker or lighter
Many tv settings 
Massive tv screen
Semi good graphics

Cons:
Lots of games have a very high input latency (mostly multiplayer games) 
Mostly made for single player games
Lots of lag on some games

As a summary this app is really good if you play it on the right games. Don’t really use it to play with friends online or you might get difficulties. Other than that it’s a great app.

It works well as long as you launch & then sync controller. Do not sync controller before or you will have to reset once in app. I always put in full immersive with black borders to make the screen as full as possible!

reviews.review_title: Great app and service, one major flaw
reviews.review_description: You have to keep pressing the xbox button to activate the xbox menu (or minimize and unminimize the app, etc) because the xbox controller use is not enough to register as app use since I guess it is live streamed and not menus-based during gameplay and therefore the meta quest headset thinks the app is idle and stops allocating resources for it so that the connection of the game becomes very laggy until you do this. This happens every day after a certain amount of play and really hurts multiplayer matches.

reviews.review_description:
xbox on meta quest is a complete joke, Input lag makes it unplayable even with a “pro” controller. Terrible resolution. Good for VR gaming, but absolutely painful on the xbox app. 

I played maybe one or two raids on Arc Raiders before having to remove my headset because of nausea & discomfort, why smoke cigarettes when i can just throw on my Meta Quest for some Xbox gaming and get the same kind of light-headedness/ headrush?

And whats worse than the dizziness you get from playing? The input lag that really ties the whole experience together & makes it truly, one of the worst. I didnt know how much i enjoyed gaming on a monitor until i tried Xbox on meta Quest.

0/10 from someone who honestly plays alot of xbox and was expecting a more seamless experience. Cloud gaming was bad, remote play was simply broken and unplayable.

Xbox cloud gaming was locked behind Game Pass Ultimate. Now, all levels of Game Pass can use their Quest 3 for remote play or cloud gaming.

The app runs great. The ability to scale the screen is a game changer. The Xbox controllers connect via Bluetooth and are easy to setup. The resolution is lower in the lower tiers of Game Pass, like essential, but they say that up front.

I used it for remote play mainly and love it. We need support for plugging a headset into the controller and get input and output. 

I wish there were some Xbox themed environments to play in and have a more immersive experience.

If you have a Quest device and Xbox game pass at any level, you should use this app.

Works pretty good see alot of people saying its horrible and blah blah but honestly sounds like most of them arnt setting. It up right u can change your screen size can make screen flat or a curve screen you can also move it close to you so the screens really large it looks good know the down side I really only use the free cloud gaming depending on your wifi u might have a bit of lag certain moments but for playing a game with graphics that good
 and it not being dowlanded how could you expect much more runs good enough to play online and very rare I've had it lag and I end up dieing or somthing but definitely worth checking out for setting up xbox controller just turn ur Bluetooth on in ur quest settings and connect to Xbox controller after that then open the Xbox launcher u might need to click with ur quest controller on the Xbox screen then ur controller will work enjoy worst case look on YouTube sher theres a guide for how to have it looking the best and good screen size and wut not

Searching for games to play is incredibly frustrating now as a game may catch your eye but it feels like 80% of the games you see are “purchase to play” I just want to see the games I can play with my gamepass subscription. It just makes the whole process very disappointing
App won’t complete the install. Zero response from Support at Meta or Xbox.
It now works, and I tried it out and it worked great and there was very few input lag. Definitely recommend if you have game pass. ￼

I love the immersive environment, it would be great if there were themed worlds to match the game you’re playing. 

If you’re looking to play FPS, racing or any real time multiplayer games, it’s unplayable. Turned based multiplayer and single player games are fun. 

It would be nice if they could figure out how to stream them with zero latency. Worth an install though!

I like using Xbox remote play while connected to my Xbox Series X and cloud gaming on my Meta Quest 3. Anchoring a huge screen on a big wall is my personal preference, but I also like to use the immersive Xbox environment as well. The Spatial Tv and Fluid apps are also a great way to play Xbox games.
